title: Campaign Monitor vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor vs Moosend. See pricing, features, ratings & find the best email marketing tool for your business needs.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Moosend: Detailed Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and Moosend are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management for agencies, while Moosend offers affordable automation with a generous free tier. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your email marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You manage multiple client brands or accounts within a single platform
You need advanced multi-brand segmentation and organization features
Your primary use case is transactional email alongside marketing campaigns
choose_b_if: You're a startup or small business with a limited budget
You want unlimited email sends without overpaying for volume
You need landing pages and subscription forms integrated with email marketing

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Moosend?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. Moosend offers better value for small businesses with its free tier and unlimited emails, earning higher ratings (4.7/5 on G2 vs 4.1/5). However, Campaign Monitor is superior for agencies requiring multi-brand management capabilities. Your choice should align with whether you prioritize cost-effectiveness or brand management features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper for most users. It offers a completely free plan for up to 1,000 subscribers, then starts at $9/month with unlimited emails. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and begins at $11/month. For budget-conscious businesses, Moosend is the clear winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list exports and imports, making migration possible. However, you should plan for some workflow reconfiguration since they have different automation interfaces. Most users can transfer their contacts and rebuild their automation sequences within a few hours to days.
